title: cakile lanceolata subsp. domingensis
intro: Cakile lanceolata subsp. domingensis, also known as the beach morning glory, is a coastal plant species within the Cakile genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its seeds and roots. The health benefits of Cakile lanceolata subsp. domingensis include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to address digestive issues and skin problems.
